exercises.code:
import numpy as np, time
n = 10000
a = np.zeros(n)
b = np.ones(n)
t0 = time.perf_counter()
r = a + b
_ = time.perf_counter() - t0
print("timed", bool(np.isclose(r.mean(), 1.0)))
